subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Desired One, Who through one blessed word shining forth from the Orient of Divine utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه مبارکه که از مشرق بیان الهیه اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels
